description: You are sizing a utility-scale Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) for a solar array. The project 'solar_array_starter.ng3' is open. Relocate the solar array to Phoenix, AZ, set the date to June 21st (Summer Solstice), and run a Daily Energy Analysis (Analysis > Solar Panels > Daily Yield Analysis). Once the simulation completes and the graph appears, export or transcribe the resulting hourly energy generation data into a CSV file named '~/Documents/Energy3D/solstice_hourly_profile.csv'. Also, identify the hour of the day with the highest peak generation and save it in a text file at '~/Documents/Energy3D/peak_charge_hour.txt' (e.g., '12:00' or '13:00'). Finally, save the modified project as '~/Documents/Energy3D/phoenix_bess_array.ng3'.
